case_title: BARBARA MESSICK VS. PG AND E LAW - CLAIMS DEPARTMENT

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MESSICK, BARBARA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PG AND E LAW - CLAIMS DEPARTMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESSICK, BARBARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PG AND E LAW - CLAIMS DEPARTMENT EVIDENCE INTRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF TO SHOW PG&E TRUCKS DAMAGED HER CAR WAS INSUFFICIENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT PG AND E LAW - CLAIMS DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MR. GOLDFARB. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
